reasoning: While programmatic signals show high content preservation (shingling recall 0.972), the LLM fidelity report identifies two major structural failures where hierarchical lists and financial data were collapsed into single dense blocks of text. This visual and semantic degradation of financial figures and agenda items makes the document difficult to use and represents a significant departure from the source PDF's layout.

concerns.analysis: The visual organization of the agenda items in the HTML output differs significantly from the source PDF. In the PDF, items 4 and 5 utilize structured lists with clear line breaks and indentation to separate sub-points (a-h and a-f) and hierarchical content (e.g., peer reviewer lists). In the HTML, these entire sections are collapsed into single, dense blocks of text within table cells. This eliminates the visual hierarchy and logical flow intended by the source document, making it difficult to
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 1 and 2 of the PDF show item 4 and 5 with distinct sub-items on new lines (e.g., 'a) Minutes...', 'b) NG 911 Fund', 'i. Vicki Callicutt', etc.).
concerns.output_quote: In the HTML screenshot, these items are rendered as continuous strings of text in the 'Topic' column (e.g., 'Consent Agenda (Vote Required) a) Minutes... b) NG 911 Fund... i. Vicki Callicutt ii. Megan Daub...').
concerns.location: Agenda Items and Presenters table, rows 4 and 5

concerns.analysis: The financial data within item 4 is visually misrendered. In the PDF, this data is presented in a clear structured list where labels are on the left and monetary values are aligned on the right. In the HTML table, this data is collapsed into a single run-on paragraph within the table cell. This prevents a sighted user from easily reading and understanding the financial figures, which were clearly meant to be visually separated and aligned.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: PDF Page 1, Section 4b: 'November 2018 Fund Balance $27,867,858', 'November 2018 Disbursement -$15,088' (aligned labels and values).
concerns.output_quote: HTML screenshot, row 4: 'November 2018 Fund Balance $27,867,858 November 2018 Disbursement -$15,088'.
concerns.location: Agenda Items and Presenters table, row 4

action_items: Check agenda items 4 and 5 to ensure list formatting and indentation are restored.
Verify financial data in section 4 is clearly legible with correct alignment between labels and values.
